video_info.title: UFC 329 - McGregor vs Holloway 2
video_info.shortDescription: A blockbuster welterweight rematch between Conor McGregor and former featherweight and BMF champion Max Holloway, marking McGregor’s return after five years away and Holloway’s welterweight debut. Tune in to catch all the action, LIVE on Sony LIV.
